title: デビュー戦の後に・ここから始まる！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I... sob... I made my debut!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's as emotional as if she'd just won the
Japanese Derby!
choice_data_list: (This moment must really mean a lot to her.)
(This moment must really mean a lot to her.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Finally, my first step into the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Thinking about it makes my heart jump up and down!
choice_data_list: I'm here with you, all the way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All RIIIGHT! Let's work hard together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tearful declaration echoes through the whole
tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, this is where the real challenges
begin. We steel ourselves for the great journey
ahead.
